title: Epic Knights'n'Mages - Forge
description: This is an Ars Nouveau addon, focused on adding new armors and Source Gem's to the game.
body:
![logo](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/knuyuw4u0ct739r0ll7e8/Knights.png?rlkey=xh7el8dvb8oyau9u3vrifwbdq&st=e717f71y&dl=1)

![](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.20.1%20-msg?style=for-the-badge&label=Minecraft%20Version&color=0096f0&cacheSeconds=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fgeckolib&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fgeckolib) 
 [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge%20-msg?style=for-the-badge&label=Modloader&color=0096f0&cacheSeconds=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fgeckolib&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fgeckolib)](https://neoforged.net/)  [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRED-message?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Ars%20Nouveau&labelColor=gray&color=%230096f0)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)  [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRED-message?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Geckolib&labelColor=gray&color=%230096f0)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

---

Ars Knights'n'Mages is an ArsNouveau addon that aims to add new source gems and new 3d armors and weapons to the game.

Note: This mod is still in progress, so it could crash and contain bugs.  

### Compat for
- [Allthemodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/allthemodium)

---
